sections.title: Standard dialogue after The Giant Dwarf

lines.speaker: Blasidar the sculptor
lines.text: The new statue looks beautiful, don't you agree?

lines.speaker: Blasidar the sculptor
lines.text: My finest piece of work, without a doubt.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Say, I was wondering, did you do the statues down in the mines as well?

lines.speaker: Blasidar the sculptor
lines.text: If only! But no, they've been there for many thousands of years, actually. Been there before dwarven recorded history.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No no, I'm sure they weren't there before!

lines.speaker: Blasidar the sculptor
lines.text: Of course they were, don't be silly!
